report.summary: Cycle v10: No new commits since e999560 (Mar 17 — 7 days stale). Git lock files persist (P0, 8 days). 695 uncommitted changes (647 untracked + 47 modified). All 6 recently published/built pages verified. 42 TS errors in structured-data.examples.ts (non-blocking). All 6 API routes structurally healthy with proper caching.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: RECENTLY PUBLISHED PAGES: All 4 pages from latest publish batch (best-perpetual-dex-guide, cross-chain-bridges-guide, ethereum-fusaka-glamsterdam-guide-2026, ai-agent-wallets-autonomous-payments-guide-2026) have page.tsx files — no missing routes.
RECENTLY BUILT PAGES: Both pages from build-v15 (solana-token-extensions-guide-2026, real-yield-defi-guide-2026) have page.tsx files — scaffolding confirmed.
PUBLISHED SLUGS: 454 total (+16 since v9's 438). 103 slugs still rely on dynamic [slug] routes without dedicated page.tsx files. Total page.tsx files in app: 1,116.

TYPESCRIPT: 42 errors in src/lib/structured-data.examples.ts (example/documentation file, JSX syntax issues). Non-blocking due to ignoreBuildErrors: true in next.config.ts. No new TS errors introduced.
BUILD: Cannot verify full production build in this environment (OOM at 4GB/8GB). Build relies on Vercel's 8GB machines. ignoreBuildErrors: true protects against the TS issues.
LINT: Next lint config issue — lint script points to invalid directory. Non-critical but should be fixed.

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: ALL 6 CORE API ROUTES PRESENT: prices (60s TTL), trending (5min), fear-greed (10min), market-metrics (60s), market-dominance (5min), defi-yields (5min). All route files exist and contain proper caching logic.
CACHE HEADERS: All 6 routes have proper Cache-Control with stale-while-revalidate headers. CDN and in-memory caching aligned.
FALLBACK DATA: prices and market-dominance have explicit FALLBACK_DATA objects. trending and fear-greed fall back to stale cache. defi-yields delegates to lib/defillama module.
RATE LIMITER: health endpoint uses checkRateLimit from @/lib/rate-limiter. Other routes should be audited for rate limiting coverage — carry-over from prior cycles.
NO DEGRADATION SIGNALS: No code changes to API routes since last cycle. Cache TTLs unchanged and appropriate for data types.

sections.title: DevOps
items: PRODUCTION: Running commit e999560 (Day 62 publish, Mar 17). No new deploys in 7 days — 695 uncommitted changes sitting in working tree.

GIT LOCKS [P0 — PERSISTENT]: .git/HEAD.lock (Mar 16 11:17) + .git/index.lock (Mar 16 13:06) — now 8 days old. Git read operations work but commits are blocked. Fix: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock. This has been flagged as P0 since cycle v2.
UNCOMMITTED DELTA: 695 total changes (647 untracked new files, 47 modified files, 0 deleted). Up from 666 in v8 — content pipeline continues producing but nothing can be committed or deployed.
BUILD CONFIG: standalone output, trailingSlash: true, staticGenerationMaxConcurrency: 4, ignoreBuildErrors: true. No config drift detected.
SECURITY HEADERS: Middleware sets X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy. No changes needed.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: SHIPPED THIS CYCLE: 0 commits, 0 deploys. Content pipeline produced 2 new learn guides (solana-token-extensions, real-yield-defi) and promoted 4 pages from publish queue, but all changes remain uncommitted.
BLOCKER [P0 — DAY 8]: Git lock files prevent all commits and deploys. Single command fix: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock. Must be resolved by Jefe manually or via authorized session.

CARRY-OVER: (1) Git lock removal, (2) Commit and deploy 695 accumulated changes, (3) Wire rate limiter to all public API routes, (4) Fix lint script configuration, (5) Add dedicated page.tsx for 103 dynamic-route slugs.
CONTENT VELOCITY: 16 new published slugs since last cycle (438 to 454), plus 29 new untracked files since v8. Pipeline is healthy but deployment is completely blocked.
RISK: 8 days of accumulated uncommitted work represents significant deployment risk. A single large commit/deploy could introduce regressions. Recommend staged commits when git is unblocked.
